# LOS and LMS admin actions (LSP: with DSP as lender)

: Vaibhav Arora
Created time: October 16, 2024 2:18 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: October 16, 2024 2:25 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

We have developed multiple admin actions (ops controlled actions) that help in servicing our customers in the onboarding as well as the servicing journey. 

This requirement covers utilising the admin actions (where needed) to cover use cases currently served by LSP (for customers) with DSP as a lender.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

Subjective:

- Coverage of use cases should be complete
- Ops should be able to support previously handled use cases (for lenders Bajaj and Tata)

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

Not applicable (internal to Volt requirement)

---

# **What is the solution?**

### Approve lien removal

This admin action enables operations team to change status of pending lien removal requests from lenders (Bajaj and Tata)

For DSP as a lender, we will get statuses for the collateral transactions and will be able to update the status as an LSP (of the request raised by the user) however, in case of downtimes, ops team should be able to fail requests raised by the customer using the admin action. 

This will mark the request (lien removal) as successful or failed.

### Approve or reject loan foreclosure

This admin action enables operations team to change status of pending foreclosure request from lenders (Bajaj and Tata)

For DSP as a lender, we will get status for the foreclosure request and will be able to update the status as an LSP (of the request raised by the user) however, in case of downtimes, ops team should be able to fail requests raised by the customer using the admin action. 

This will mark the request (lien removal) as successful or failed.

###
